description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 11 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 39 mins. His activity was mostly in Java (64%) and Markdown (22%), with the remainder in other languages. The data shows work across 4 projects, with no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
